description_long: This is a modern school complex featuring two main buildings arranged on a landscaped plot with green lawns and scattered trees. The primary structure has a distinctive curved, almost horseshoe-shaped footprint with large windows wrapping around its perimeter, suggesting ample natural light for classrooms or communal spaces. The secondary building is more rectangular and set apart, possibly serving as an administrative or auxiliary facility. Pathways and paved areas connect the buildings, and there is a circular courtyard or gathering space at the center of the main structure. The site is bordered by a mix of grass and paved surfaces, with several trees providing shade and visual interest. The overall design emphasizes openness, accessibility, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern school complex with a curved main building, a separate rectangular structure, landscaped lawns, and connecting pathways.
description_view_0: From this angle, the curved main building and its central courtyard are prominent, with the secondary building visible in the background and several trees dotting the landscape.
description_view_1: This view highlights the elongated curve of the main building and shows the secondary building set further back, with more of the green lawn visible.
description_view_2: Here, the secondary building is in the foreground, while the main building's curved form and central courtyard are seen from the side, emphasizing the site's elevation changes.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the entrance area to the secondary building and the main building's curved facade, with pathways and landscaping connecting the two.
